title: Character speech and motion share one bounded behavior contract
summary: Character anatomy, emotion, attribution, movement, sound, context, and accessibility cannot diverge.
guidance: Use approved original-character recipes with proportional intensity, interruptibility, critical-domain exclusions, and equivalent reduced modes.
do: Define static, reduced-motion, and no-audio equivalents
Test silhouette, rig, repetition, interruption, and low-end performance
dont: Use character humor in security, consent, payment, safety, or data-loss flows
verification: Cross-modal fixture review covering copy, motion, sound, accessibility, rig bounds, and critical contexts
